title: HorizonsMC
description: Embark on a breathtaking adventure in HorizonsMC, the official modpack for the MysticHorizonsMC server! This pack is designed to enhance every aspect of your Minecraft experience, from exploration and creativity to combat and community engagement.
body:
# 🌌 Welcome to **HorizonsMC**: A Journey Beyond Vanilla Minecraft  
_The Official Modpack for MysticHorizonsMC_ 

---

### 🧠 **Minimum Requirements**  
**RAM:** **6GB minimum** (8GB+ strongly recommended)  
**Java Version:** Java 17  
**Loader:** Fabric (1.20.1)  
**Launcher Support:** Modrith (Most Recommended), CurseForge App, Prism Launcher, MultiMC, or manual install

## Offsite Mod Requirements
- [FTB Quests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-fabric/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.20.1&gameVersionTypeId=4) Version: **2001.4.13**
- [FTB XMod Compat](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-xmod-compat/files/6402485) Version: **Fabric - 2.1.3**
- [FTB Library (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-fabric/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.20.1) Version: **2001.2.9**
- [FTB Teams (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-fabric/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.20.1) Version: **2001.3.1**

---

## 🔥 What is HorizonsMC?

**HorizonsMC** is a massive, performance-optimized modpack designed for the **MysticHorizonsMC** server. Featuring **300+ mods**, it combines RPG systems, magic, advanced combat, technology, exploration, farming, and QOL enhancements into one seamless experience.

Whether you're an adventurer, a spellcaster, a builder, or an engineer, this pack has a **path for everyone** — with dynamic class systems, skill progression, and a living world to shape.

---

### 🌍 **Explore Vast & Dynamic Worlds**
- Journey through enhanced terrain with **Terralith**, **BetterEnd**, and **BetterNether**
- Conquer new dimensions like **The Aether**, and **Deeper and Darker**
- Discover world-gen upgrades via **YUNG's Structures**, **Dungeons & Taverns**, **Integrated Stronghold**
- Seamlessly teleport and map with **Waystones**, **Xaero's Minimap**, and **World Map**

---

### ⚔️ **RPG Combat, Classes & Skill Trees**
- Enjoy fluid action with **Better Combat**, and **Ranged Weapon API**
- Choose from modular RPG classes:  
  - **Paladin**, **Rogue**, **Wizard**, **Elemental Wizard**, **Archer**, **Berserker**, **Force Master**, and more via **TinyConfig-based class mods**
- Customize stats and skills with:
  - **PlayerEx**, **Spell Power**, **Spell Engine**
- Engage mythical mobs from **Witcher RPG**, **Cataclysm**, **Death Knights**, and others

---

### 🏗️ **Tech & Automation Systems**
- Master the **Create Mod** ecosystem:
  - **Create: Steam 'n' Rails**, **Create Deco**, **Create Ironworks**, **Create Structures**
- Expand automation with **Create Utilities**, **CraterLib**, **Slice & Dice**
- Build stunning bases using **Macaw’s Mods**, **Decorative Blocks**, **Supplementaries**, and **MrCrayfish’s Furniture**

---

### ✨ **Magic, Enchanting & Artifacts**
- Unlock ancient powers with **Wizards**, **Runes**, **WizardEx**, **Spell Engine**, **Apothic Attributes**
- Enchant and empower gear using **Zenith**, **Ancient Reforging**, **RelicEx**, and **Eternal Attributes**
- Collect magical items and relics via **Artifacts**, **Lootr**, and **Loot Journal**

---

### 🌾 **Farming, Cooking & Living**
- Cook hearty meals and brew potions:
  - **Farmer’s Delight**, **Expanded Delight**, **Cultural Delights**, **Bakery**, **Brewery**
- Cultivate and automate farming using **Botarium**, **Farm & Charm**, and **Meadow**
- Relax with immersive lifestyle mods like **Candlelight**, **Small Ships**, and **Let's Do Vinery**

---

### 💰 **Quests, Contracts & Unlockables**
- Embark on custom quests with **Missions**, **Loot 'n' Explore**, and **AdventureZ**
- Take on bounties via **Bountiful**, **Extra Bounties**, **Numismatic Overhaul**
- Progress with **Loot Journal**, **Unlocker Mods**, and profession-based expansions

---

### 🧰 **Storage, Protection & Utility**
- Store and organize with **Tom's Storage** and **StorageDelight**
- Protect builds using **Open Parties & Claims (OPAC)**, and **NumismaticClaim**
- Fine-tune your world with **TinyConfig**, **MixinExtras**, **Data Attributes**, and **Structure Pool API**

---

### 🎧 **Immersion, Audio & Performance**
- Immersive audio with **Sound Physics Remastered** and **Simple Voice Chat**
- Visual & performance boosts via **Sodium**, **Iris Shaders**, **Rubidium**, **Indium**, **Clumps**, **Krypton**, and **Reese’s Sodium Options**
- Enhanced config options via **Mod Menu**, **ForgeConfigAPI Port**, and **Resourceful Libs**

---

### 🧭 **Tools, Maps & Professions**
- Navigate and manage gameplay with:
  - **Jade**, **Jade Addons**, **JEI**, **JEResources**, **Just Enough Professions**, **Just Enough Breeding**
- Zoom and search utilities with **JustZoom**, **Searchables**, and **Copycats**
- Learn and level professions with class/job-based modules

---

## 🚧 MysticHorizonsMC Server Status  
> 🏗️ **Currently in development** – Open Beta Closed. Working on final product.  
> Join the Discord for dev logs, sneak peeks, and upcoming launch info!

---

## 🧾 Help & Support  
📢 For modpack help or connection issues, check out:  
- 🎙️ [Simple Voice Chat (Required)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)  
- 💬 [MysticHorizonsMC Discord](https://discord.gg/HwX8TU33Zg)

---

## ✨ Start Your Journey Today  
**Download HorizonsMC**, join our community, and step into a **new era of modded Minecraft** with **mystery, magic, and machines**.
